rikka.material.preference.MaterialSwitch.app:title: Night Mode
rikka.material.preference.MaterialSwitch.app:summary: Enable night mode to get a dark tone in app and help protect your eyes

rikka.material.preference.MaterialSwitch.app:title: Adaptive App Icon
rikka.material.preference.MaterialSwitch.app:summary: App icon changes according to the app theme

rikka.preference.SimpleMenuPreference.app:title: App Icon
rikka.preference.SimpleMenuPreference.app:summary: Select app icon that should be in your app drawer

rikka.material.preference.MaterialSwitch.app:title: Auto Check For Updates
rikka.material.preference.MaterialSwitch.app:summary: App will automatically check for updates

rikka.material.preference.MaterialSwitch.app:title: Update Automatically
rikka.material.preference.MaterialSwitch.app:summary: App will be updated automatically whenever there's a new release

Preference.app:title: Check For Updates
Preference.app:summary: Check for new releases to get the latest features and bug fixes

Preference.app:title: Add Words
Preference.app:summary: Add new words to the library and help us improve

Preference.app:title: Fix Translation
Preference.app:summary: Fix a translation, help us correct the mistakes in our library

Preference.app:title: Report Bug
Preference.app:summary: Help us catch the bug that causes inconvenience for you or crashes the app
Share the app and help us reach everyone
Give a rating and let us know how much you loved our app
